class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as 2-phenoxypropionic acids. These are aromatic compounds hat contain a phenol ether attached to the C2-atom of a phenylpropionic acid.

direct_parent.description: Aromatic compounds hat contain a phenol ether attached to the C2-atom of a phenylpropionic acid.
direct_parent.name: 2-phenoxypropionic acids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Aromatic compounds hat contain a phenol ether attached to the C2-atom of a phenylpropionic acid.
subclass.name: 2-phenoxypropionic acids

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
